message:
fix(tests): update scheduler lock and capability return type usage

Update all .scheduler.lock() calls to .scheduler.lock().unwrap() in
event_loop_conformance.rs and lab_runtime_extensions.rs to match the
scheduler field's change from a direct-return lock type to std::sync::Mutex
which returns Result<MutexGuard>. Affected: 12 call sites in
event_loop_conformance (run_scheduler_under_lab, lab_scheduler_invariants,
lab_timer_cancellation, lab_virtual_time_timer_ordering,
lab_event_loop_determinism, lab_event_loop_invariants,
lab_hostcall_error_outcomes, lab_mixed_interleaving,
lab_time_until_next_timer) and 12 call sites in lab_runtime_extensions
(single_task, ordering, extension_manager_creation, register_extensions,
budget_set_and_get, budget_constants, concurrent_registration,
concurrent_provider_and_tool, no_invariant_violations, quiescence,
extension_ops_pass_across_seeds).

Update ext_proptest.rs to remove .as_str() calls on required_capability()
results, as the method now returns &'static str directly instead of String.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
